description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine change_swsmod_con_2, and is implemented by a call to change_swsmod_con_2. Use this API to change the value of a CON of the switched shunt model of a specified switched shunt device. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = change_swsmod_con(ibus, model, j, rdata)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Switched shunt bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Con number to change relative to the start of the block of cons assigned to this model (1 for con(j), 2 for con(j+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: rdata
parameters.description: New con value. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: no model at this switched shunt device.
model at this switched shunt is aaa not xxx.
no input CONs used in model.
CON number outside of the CON range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
